question: ventas por mes y categoria contable
sql: SELECT DF.MES, DP.COD_CAT_CONTA, SUM(FVT.VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO) AS VENTA FROM DDM_ERP.FAC_VENTA_TOTAL FVT LEFT JOIN DDM_ERP.DIM_PRODUCTO DP ON FVT.ID_PRODUCTO = DP.ID_PRODUCTO LEFT JOIN DDM_ERP.DIM_CLIENTE DC ON FVT.ID_CLIENTE = DC.ID_CLIENTE LEFT JOIN DDM_ERP.DIM_FECHA DF ON FVT.DATE_CONTA = DF.FECHA WHERE FVT.VENTA_AUTOCONSUMO <> 0 AND DC.DESC_TIPO_ID <> 'NO APLICA' GROUP BY DF.MES, DP.COD_CAT_CONTA LIMIT 1000

question: presupuesto por compania y material
sql: SELECT DC.COD_COMPANIA, DM.NOM_MATERIAL, SUM(PPTO.CANTIDAD) AS CANTIDAD FROM DDM_ERP.FAC_SGA_PRESUPUESTO_EXT PPTO LEFT JOIN DDM_ERP.DIM_COMPANIA DC ON PPTO.ID_COMPANIA = DC.ID_COMPANIA LEFT JOIN DDM_ERP.DIM_SGA_MATERIAL DM ON PPTO.ID_MATERIAL = DM.ID_MATERIAL GROUP BY DC.COD_COMPANIA, DM.NOM_MATERIAL LIMIT 1000

question: valor real por mes en estado de resultados
sql: SELECT EF.CCIA, CAST(CONCAT('20', EF.ANIO_FISCAL, '-', M.MES, '-01') AS DATE) AS FECHA, CASE M.MES WHEN '01' THEN EF.ENE_ACT WHEN '02' THEN EF.FEB_ACT WHEN '03' THEN EF.MAR_ACT WHEN '04' THEN EF.ABR_ACT WHEN '05' THEN EF.MAY_ACT WHEN '06' THEN EF.JUN_ACT WHEN '07' THEN EF.JUL_ACT WHEN '08' THEN EF.AGO_ACT WHEN '09' THEN EF.SEP_ACT WHEN '10' THEN EF.OCT_ACT WHEN '11' THEN EF.NOV_ACT WHEN '12' THEN EF.DIC_ACT END AS VALOR FROM DDM_ERP.FAC_ESTRESULTADOS_ACT_ALL EF JOIN (SELECT '01' AS MES UNION ALL SELECT '02' UNION ALL SELECT '03' UNION ALL SELECT '04' UNION ALL SELECT '05' UNION ALL SELECT '06' UNION ALL SELECT '07' UNION ALL SELECT '08' UNION ALL SELECT '09' UNION ALL SELECT '10' UNION ALL SELECT '11' UNION ALL SELECT '12') M ON 1=1 LIMIT 1000

question: valor por articulo y mes en kardex agricola
sql: SELECT CAST(CONCAT(YEAR(KA.FECHA), '-', MONTH(KA.FECHA), '-01') AS DATE) AS MES, KA.CODIGOCORTO, SUM(KA.VALOR) AS VALOR FROM DDM_ERP.FAC_V_MQRY_KARDEX_AGRICOLA KA JOIN DDM_ERP.DIM_PRODUCTO DP ON KA.CODIGOCORTO = DP.ID_PRODUCTO WHERE KA.CIA IN ('00105','00106','00107','00111') GROUP BY MES, KA.CODIGOCORTO LIMIT 1000
